title: Curse (disambiguation) - Wikipedia
body: Look up curse in Wiktionary, the free dictionary. A curse is a spell or incantation intended to harm. Curse ( s ) may also refer to: Film and television [ edit ] Curses! (film) , a 1925 film directed by Fatty Arbuckle Curses! (TV series) , a 2023 streaming television series "Curse" ( The Secret Circle ) , a 2012 TV episode "Curses!" ( Brandy & Mr. Whiskers ) , a 2006 TV episode "Curses" ( Space Ghost Coast to Coast ) , a 1998 TV episode Music [ edit ] Curse (rapper) (born 1978), German rapper Albums [ edit ] Curse (Alien Sex Fiend album) , 1990 Curse (The Legendary Pink Dots album) , 1983 Curses (Future of the Left album) , 2007 Curse (Unknown Mortal Orchestra EP) , 2025 Curses , by Vanna , 2007 Songs [ edit ] "Curse", by Cult of Luna from Eternal Kingdom , 2008 "Curse", by Imagine Dragons from Imagine Dragons , 2009 "Curse", by Jamie Drastik, featuring David Rush and Big Ali , 2010 "Curse", by Architects from The Sky, the Earth & All Between , 2024 "Curses", by Bullet for My Valentine from Bullet for My Valentine , 2004 "A Curse", by Bury Tomorrow from The Union of Crowns , 2012 Video games [ edit ] Curse (video game) , a 1989 Sega Mega Drive console game Curse: The Eye of Isis , a 2003 video game Curses (video game) , a 1993 interactive fiction computer game Curse LLC , an online video game portal and software company Other [ edit ] Curse (character) , a fictional villain in the comic book Spawn Curses (anthology) , a 1989 collection of fantasy and science fiction stories Curses (programming library) , a programming library for Unix and Unix-like systems Profanity , a socially offensive use of language See also [ edit ] All pages with titles beginning with Curse All pages with titles containing Curse The Curse (disambiguation) Cursed (disambiguation) Topics referred to by the same term This disambiguation page lists articles associated with the title Curse . If an internal link incorrectly led you here, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended article.
